title: Denis Tu
compiled_truth: Denis Tu is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-12 to 2002-05-06), Denis Tu sent 20 and received 145 emails, totalling 165 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (16), [E  Rosenberg](people/e-rosenberg) (9), [John Keiser](people/john-keiser) (7), [James Centilli](people/james-centilli) (6), [Caroline Barnes](people/caroline-barnes) (6).
